question_text: Which of the following objects has kinetic energy?

options.label: A
options.text: A stationary car parked in a garage

options.label: B
options.text: A car driving down the motorway

options.label: D
options.text: A compressed spring on a shelf

explanation: Kinetic energy is the energy of movement. Only the car driving down the motorway is moving, so only that car has kinetic energy. A parked car has no kinetic energy, coffee has thermal energy (heat), and a compressed spring has elastic potential energy.
